Itinerary.title: 7-Day Toronto Trip
Itinerary.summary: A 7-day plan mixing major attractions, neighborhood exploration, culinary stops, and relaxed days to recharge.

Transportation.mode: Airport to hotel (UP Express or taxi)
Transportation.notes: Take UP Express from Pearson to Union Station for faster transit.

POI.name: Harbourfront / Queens Quay
POI.description: Gentle waterfront walk to stretch legs and get oriented.

Restaurant.name: Dinner on the Waterfront
Restaurant.description: Casual dinner with lake views to end the arrival day.

POI.name: CN Tower & Ripley's Aquarium
POI.description: Visit the CN Tower observation level then the nearby aquarium.

POI.name: St. Lawrence Market
POI.description: Explore food stalls and local vendors; good lunch spot.

POI.name: Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)
POI.description: Collections of natural history and world cultures.

POI.name: Casa Loma or Allan Gardens
POI.description: Choose a historic castle visit or a relaxing greenhouse garden depending on energy.

Transportation.notes: Ferries leave from Jack Layton Ferry Terminal; check schedule.

POI.name: Centre Island / Hanlan's Point
POI.description: Relax, swim, or picnic; great skyline views from the islands.

POI.name: Kensington Market
POI.description: Eclectic market area with vintage shops and street art.

POI.name: Queen Street West
POI.description: Trendy boutiques, galleries, and dinner options.

POI.name: Day trip to Niagara or visit AGO (Art Gallery of Ontario)
POI.description: Choose a full-day excursion to Niagara Falls or deeper art exploration in the city.

POI.name: Last-minute shopping or neighborhood stroll
POI.description: Relaxed morning with optional final visits depending on departure time.

Transportation.notes: Allow time for travel and check-in.
